name: antigravity
description: Antigravity — Unified Market Intelligence & Gravity Search Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "GRAVITY-API,MARKET-SRV,MARKET-UI" --prefix-colors "cyan.bold,yellow.bold,magenta.bold" "npm run gravity:api" "npm run market:server" "npm run market:ui"
scripts.build: npm -w shared-types run build && npm -w market-ui run build && npm -w market-server run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd services/gravity-api && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.clean: rimraf apps/*/node_modules services/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules node_modules services/gravity-api/.venv
